faq.subtitle: Kev Paub Txog
faq.title: Cov <gradient>Lus</gradient> Nquag Nug
faq.description: Txhua yam koj yuav tsum paub txog kev ua haujlwm nrog Horizon Tech

scope.question: Koj txoj haujlwm yog dab tsi?
scope.answer: Peb xa cov phiaj xwm thev naus laus zis kawg-rau-kawg: kev cai kev lag luam software, AI / ML pipelines, huab infrastructure, IoT systems, DevOps automation, thiab kev pab tswv yim hloov digital. Txawm hais tias koj xav tau tag nrho lub platform tsim los ntawm kos lossis lub hom phiaj kev sib koom ua ke nrog koj cov pawg uas twb muaj lawm, peb saib xyuas architecture, kev txhim kho, kev sim thiab xa tawm.

stack.question: Dab tsi yog koj cov tub ntxhais thev naus laus zis pawg?
stack.answer: Peb cov tub ntxhais pawg tsom rau kev lag luam-qib platform: Azure thiab AWS rau huab, .NET thiab Node.js rau backend, React thiab Angular rau frontend, Kubernetes thiab Docker rau orchestration, thiab Terraform rau kev tsim kho vaj tse raws li cov cai. Peb kuj ua haujlwm ntau nrog Python rau AI / ML ua haujlwm, Power BI thiab Fabric rau kev lag luam txawj ntse, thiab PostgreSQL, SQL Server thiab MongoDB rau cov ntaub ntawv.

enterprise.question: Koj ua li cas nrog cov phiaj xwm kev lag luam?
enterprise.answer: Txhua qhov kev sib koom tes pib nrog kev tshawb pom theem los txhais qhov chaw, architecture, thiab cov ntsiab lus. Koj tau txais ib pab neeg mob siab nrog tus thawj coj thev naus laus zis, kev tshuaj xyuas tsis tu ncua, thiab nkag mus ncaj qha rau cov kws ua haujlwm tsim koj lub cev. Peb ua raws li agile sprints nrog cov neeg muaj feem cuam tshuam demos, tswj cov phiaj xwm pob tshab, thiab muab cov ntawv qhia txog kev nce qib txhua lub limtiam.

support.question: Kev txhawb nqa tom qab pib zoo li cas?
support.answer: Peb muab cov txheej txheem txhawb nqa nrog cov lus txhais SLAs, suav nrog 24/7 kev saib xyuas, kev tiv thaiv xwm txheej, kev ua haujlwm zoo thiab cov yam ntxwv iteration. Peb cov lus cog tseg txhawb nqa npog kev kho kab laum, thaj kev ruaj ntseg, kev tsim kho vaj tse, thiab kev kuaj xyuas kev noj qab haus huv - ua kom haum rau koj lub sijhawm ua haujlwm thiab lub sijhawm teb.

integration.question: Koj puas tuaj yeem koom ua ke nrog peb cov kev tsim kho uas twb muaj lawm?
integration.answer: kiag li. Peb tshwj xeeb hauv kev hloov kho qub txeeg qub teg, API-thawj kev sib koom ua ke, thiab hybrid huab tsiv teb tsaws chaw. Txawm hais tias koj yuav tsum txuas rau on-premise ERP systems, tsiv teb tsaws chaw los ntawm monoliths mus rau microservices, lossis txuas cov qub txeeg qub teg nrog cov frontends niaj hnub, peb muaj cov phau ntawv tsiv teb tsaws chaw thiab kev paub txog kev sib koom ua ke los ua kom nws tsis muaj kev sib luag.

industries.question: Koj tau ua haujlwm hauv kev lag luam twg?
industries.answer: Peb pab neeg tau xa cov phiaj xwm thoob plaws fintech, kev noj qab haus huv, logistics, kev lag luam e-lag luam, lub zog, thiab tsoomfwv kev lag luam. Peb nkag siab txog kev lag luam tshwj xeeb xws li PCI-DSS rau kev them nyiaj, HIPAA xav txog cov ntaub ntawv kev noj qab haus huv, GDPR ua raws li EU kev lag luam, thiab telemetry tiag tiag rau kev lag luam IoT.

engagement.question: Cov txheej txheem kev sib koom tes zoo li cas?
engagement.answer: Nws pib nrog kev tshawb pom hu kom nkag siab txog koj lub hom phiaj thiab cov toj roob hauv pes. Los ntawm qhov ntawd, peb xa cov ntaub ntawv scoping nrog cov lus pom zoo architecture, sijhawm, thiab kev nqis peev tawg. Thaum pom zoo, peb ncaws tawm nrog pab pawg mob siab, onboard rau hauv koj cov cuab yeej thiab cov haujlwm ua haujlwm, thiab pib thawj qhov kev sib tw hauv hnub.
